title: hosackia stipularis var. ottleyi
intro: Hosackia stipularis var. ottleyi, also known as Ottley's tick trefoil, is a plant species belonging to the Fabaceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Hosackia stipularis var. ottleyi include its potential to reduce inflammation, relieve pain, and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are often used to make teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
